text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky and I decide to visit a shrine for a
change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: This weather's just perfect for basking in the sun.
choice_data_list: Shall we go make a prayer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'll pass. I'm not really one for divine
providence and whatnot.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Please, bring me victory in my next race!
choice_data_list: Oh, looks like someone else is here.
Oh, looks like someone else is here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup, they're praying real hard too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Seiun Sky. And how long have you
been here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting to bump into you here. Praying
for a win, huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heavens, as if I'd need to pray for such a thing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I simply came here for a moment of peace. I
thought that perhaps some repose might be
necessary to ensure victory.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I've now given the gods the opportunity to
grant my noble wishes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. Like the final prep before you step out
onto the track.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, something like that. You should take this
opportunity to reflect on yourself as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now then, if you'll excuse me. Ohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I guess she wouldn't be King if she did it any other
way. Still...
choice_data_list:
There might be something you can learn from
her.

There might be something you can learn from
her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep, she's one to keep an eye on...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Welp, maybe I'll do a little praying myself. ♪
Haven't been feeling that good lately.
And so, Seiun Sky and I pray together.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: 'Kay, that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I'm actually feeling pretty good now! I
guess coming to the shrine for a break wasn't such
a bad idea.

In high spirits again, Seiun Sky looks as if she's
back to her old self.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I'm not feeling too different...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose it's not like praying's the kinda
thing that works in an instant.

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow!
choice_data_list: Was that a black cat that just crossed our path?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! Don't get all spooked. Them being
bad luck's just some old wives' tale.

Whether black cats are bad luck or not, Seiun
Sky's condition doesn't improve.
